title: 有馬記念の後に・黒星

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Well! That was a fun race. Yes, indeed... I wonder.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
If the hands of time had moved differently, would
Maruzen have lost at the Arima?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What are you talking about?! Maruzen
wasn't the one who lost today! I was!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm not going to give up just because of
this! I'll beat you next time, I swear!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
That means we'll be at two-nothing after next
year's Arima!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a mess this has become. First you
entered the Japan Cup, and now even C.B. has
run in the Arima...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
After all the care and thought I put into advising
you, too. You can lead an Umamusume to water,
but you can't make her drink, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but it was so much fun! What's the harm in
having some fun, hm?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Come on, stop looking so severe. Cheer up
and get swept up in the festivities around you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can't hide it from me... You were excited
during the race, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
See, I told you so! Not only is Chiyo determined,
but she's fun to watch!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But this is just the beginning for her. She'll
become even more spectacular yet!
